source: GSC Pages report issues (from URL Inspection API mapping)

actions: None — no pages are accidentally noindexed, blocked, 404, or wrong canonical

issues.affected: 10 T1 calculators + 1 T2 — all indexed but ranking at position 30+ with 0 clicks
issues.action: Improve meta titles/descriptions, add FAQ schema, build internal links from blogs
issues.impact: HIGH — moving from pos 30 to pos 10 would generate first clicks
issues.risk: LOW — pages already indexed, only improving on-page factors

issues.affected: 5 T2 calculators + key blogs + guides — 162 total
issues.action: Add unique explanatory content, real examples, FAQ sections, internal links from indexed pages
issues.impact: HIGH — getting 50 more important pages indexed would expand search footprint
issues.risk: MEDIUM — content changes needed, takes 2-4 weeks to see results
issues.validate_fix: Only AFTER content improvements deployed + 2 week wait

issues.affected: 111 pages including T3 calculators, blogs, tools
issues.action: Resubmit sitemap via GSC, add internal links from indexed pages, check sitemap includes all URLs
issues.impact: MEDIUM — will move pages from 'unknown' to 'discovered'

issues.action: Improve meta descriptions, add structured data, target long-tail keywords
issues.impact: MEDIUM — clicks require ranking improvement first

issues.affected: Tier 3 calculators, generic tools, thin comparisons
issues.action: Consolidate thin pages, noindex off-topic tools (BMI, age, fraction), improve finance-relevant T3 calculators
issues.impact: MEDIUM — signals quality to Google, improves overall site quality score
issues.risk: MEDIUM — removing pages may lose some long-tail potential

issues.affected: Non-finance tools (BMI, age, phone plan, vacation budget, wedding budget)
issues.action: Add noindex to clearly off-topic pages or consolidate into a single utilities hub
issues.validate_fix: Only for removed pages — validate 404/410 if pages deleted
